ksa_text: Conduct data and AI due diligence assessments for M&A and investment transactions, including data asset evaluation, technical architecture review, AI risk assessment, key person risk assessment, and integration planning.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy falls outside the primary competency scope of the Domain Data Lead. This task KSA does not align with the role's core responsibilities and is excluded.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Is Leadership & Strategy truly out-of-scope for the Domain Data Lead? Emerging role definitions may include broader competency expectations.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Current job market analysis and framework definitions (DCWF, DDAT, NICE) do not list Leadership & Strategy as a core or recommended competency for the Domain Data Lead. Role scope exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence confirms Leadership & Strategy falls outside the established competency profile for the Domain Data Lead. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy is outside the competency scope of the Domain Data Lead. All evaluation passes consistently support exclusion.
